title: Down's Syndrome patients entitled to guardianship under National Trust Act: Kerala HC
description: The Kerala High Court on Tuesday held that persons with Down Syndrome are entitled to the protections available under the National Trust for the Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 [XXX v The District Collector, Kottayam & ors].Hence, authorities cannot reject guardianship applications on the ground that the condition is not recognised under the statute, the Court held.Justice CS Dias made the observation while setting aside
